name: YES BANK Paisabazaar PaisaSave RuPay Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 2 Reward Points per INR 200 spent on UPI transactions above Rs 2,000

exclusions: UPI scan & pay transactions up to Rs 2,000
additionalBenefits: Virtual RuPay accompaniment to the physical PaisaSave card
1% cashback on eligible UPI transactions above Rs 2,000

Lifetime free card with nil joining and annual fee
